entity.summary: BNB Chain-born decentralized exchange and DeFi protocol family launched in 2020 and still active as a multichain DEX stack under the PancakeSwap brand.
entity.notes: Entity-level umbrella record. Official materials state PancakeSwap launched in 2020, but this pass does not pin a stronger official day-level launch marker. Deployment-level and product-level modeling are still pending.

evidence.title: Welcome to PancakeSwap
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation describes PancakeSwap as an active decentralized exchange and DeFi protocol with live trading, liquidity, and related products.

evidence.title: PancakeSwap business partnerships
evidence.notes: First-party documentation confirms current exchange, liquidity, token-launch, and multichain partnership activity under the PancakeSwap identity.
